projects.title: Custom Dashboard — Governed Analytics at Enterprise Scale
projects.description: Designed a real-time, modular dashboard builder that closed four critical competitive gaps against Qualtrics and Polymer AI — replacing a manual email reporting chain with a governed, live-sharing canvas accessible to non-technical Account Managers.
projects.ndaNote: Employer and product details anonymised at their request. Full context available under mutual NDA.

projects.title: Smart Filter Architecture — Cross-Product UX Infrastructure
projects.description: Identified that five inconsistent filter implementations across five products were a platform infrastructure failure — not a UI problem. Redesigned from the architecture up: shared component, smart suggestion layer, and shared filter library. Engineering lead noted it halved implementation scope for future products.
projects.ndaNote: Employer and sensitive performance metrics anonymised at their request. Full context available under mutual NDA.

projects.title: Customer Directory — Data Management for Regulated Industries
projects.description: End-to-end UX ownership of a CRM-integrated data management system for credit unions, healthcare networks, and K–12 institutions. Owned information architecture, interaction design, usability research, stakeholder alignment, and a 47-component design system. Evidence convinced leadership to pivot — shipped within three months.
projects.ndaNote: Employer and product details anonymised at their request. Full context available under mutual NDA.

projects.title: AI-Powered Derived Fields — 0→1 Feature for Analytical Trust
projects.description: Designed a 0→1 AI capability that lets analysts compute and enrich contact data inside the platform — eliminating the export-to-spreadsheet cycle eroding platform trust. Includes AI suggestion panel, trust architecture, onboarding flow, and empty state. Spans banking, healthcare, and CX verticals.

projects.title: Experience Navigator — AI Strategy Generation for CX/EX Leaders
projects.description: Designed an AI-powered strategy generation tool for mid-to-senior CX/EX leaders — converting abstract goals like 'reduce churn' into operational programmes with survey logic, KPIs, and board-ready output. 3-month sprint. Targets healthcare, financial services, and K–12.

projects.title: Breaking the Enterprise Ceiling — AI-Orchestrated PLG
projects.description: Designed the product experience for an enterprise positioning shift — from a platform loved by small teams to one that closes regulated enterprise buyers. Used Lightning Decision Jam methodology. Designed governance, role-based access, and compliance signals as conversion levers.

projects.title: Cutting Survey Creation Time by 90% — AI-Powered Survey Builder
projects.description: Designed an AI-assisted survey creation flow that reduced time-to-first-survey by 90% for non-expert users. Solved the blank-canvas problem with AI-generated question suggestions, smart branching logic, and a non-blocking nudge system that kept expert users in flow while guiding novices.

projects.title: AI-Powered Insights — Narrative Reporting for High-Stakes Enterprise
projects.description: Designed an AI-driven reporting engine that transforms raw survey data into automated, executive-ready narratives for healthcare, finance, and K–12 education. Replaced legacy exports with vertically contextualised insights — reducing manual reporting time and increasing analyst trust in platform-generated output.
